repo_observation.summary: Current repository snapshot contains research artifacts and bundled binary assets; no explicit first-party RC-600 Dev schema/UI/state source modules were discovered in this tree.
repo_observation.implication: Convergence can only be scored against represented model artifacts, not against implemented planner/editor runtime behavior in source code.

why: Validated structural model exists in research artifacts, but it is not yet operationalized into explicit editable state schemas and planning workflows in this repo snapshot.
Domain coverage is captured as evidence/claims, not as enforceable app-level model constraints.

already_modeled_correctly: Validated model captures Track-vs-Input/Rhythm split and output bus families.
Validated model captures Track 1..6 and Mic/Inst/Rhythm member sets.
missing: No explicit planner data model for per-memory routing matrices with conditional phones behavior.
No source-visible state transitions/rules for destination routing edits.
oversimplified: Current representation is claim/evidence text, not editable matrix state with validation constraints.
wrong_abstraction_level: Evidence-level statements are being used where domain-level state schema should exist (memory -> routing tables -> destinations).
ROUTING.smallest_corrective_next_step: Define a minimal routing state schema (MemoryRouting) with explicit groups: routing_track and routing_input_rhythm; include destination keys MAIN/SUB1/SUB2/PHONES and member enums validated from current evidence.

already_modeled_correctly: Bounce In source set and bitwise-like member structure are validated in docs+XML evidence.
missing: No explicit per-track input-source model in app state (source selection, toggle set, serialization intent).
No planner semantics for cross-track dependency checks during bounce planning.
oversimplified: Bounce In appears as a single claim rather than a typed TrackInputSourceSet with constraints.
wrong_abstraction_level: Field-level evidence exists without corresponding track-level planning object.
TRACK_BOUNCE_IN.smallest_corrective_next_step: Add a TrackInputSourceSet type with members {mic1,mic2,inst1L,inst1R,inst2L,inst2R,rhythm} and attach it to each track plan entry; store an explicit 'encoding_pending' flag instead of asserting canonical bit packing.

already_modeled_correctly: ASSIGN1..16 and core field family are validated.
missing: No explicit assign-bank structure with 16 slots in planner state.
No source-visible validation of source/target range compatibility (act low/high vs target low/high).
oversimplified: Assign structure is represented textually; no typed slot schema enforcing required fields.
wrong_abstraction_level: Evidence and UI labels are standing in for domain rules (assign automation intent + value bounds).
ASSIGN.smallest_corrective_next_step: Implement an AssignSlot schema (x16) with required fields: switch, source, mode, act_low, act_high, target, target_low, target_high; add lightweight invariant checks and leave unresolved fields explicitly nullable.

already_modeled_correctly: Pedal Mode1/2/3 with Pedal1..9 structure is validated.
External CTL1..4 and EXP1/2 function + min/max structure is validated.
missing: No explicit control-surface planning model that separates internal pedal modes from external/expression controls.
No rule layer for mode-switch implications across planned memories.
oversimplified: CTL function coverage is flattened into claims; not represented as mode-indexed control maps.
wrong_abstraction_level: Guardrail notes (e.g., RC-505 compatibility field) are mixed near semantic structure instead of isolated compatibility metadata.
CTL_FUNC.smallest_corrective_next_step: Create ControlPlan model with sub-objects: pedal_modes[1..3][pedal1..9], ext_ctrl[ctl1..4], expression[exp1..2], and a separate compatibility_metadata bucket for ignored fields.

already_modeled_correctly: Evidence set is memory-oriented (routing, track, assign, ctl) and can seed memory-plan composition.
missing: No canonical memory-plan aggregate object combining ROUTING + TRACK + ASSIGN + CTL into one editable unit.
No staged planner workflow (draft -> validate -> export-ready) visible in source artifacts.
oversimplified: Current outputs are static audit/claim artifacts, not planner state with diffable revisions.
wrong_abstraction_level: Project currently emphasizes extraction evidence over planning operations (scenario design, conflict detection, memory set sequencing).
SET_MEMORY_PLANNING.smallest_corrective_next_step: Introduce a MemoryPlan aggregate schema and a JSON fixture set (3-5 representative memories) that exercises routing/track/assign/ctl interactions; use this as the first executable planning surface before any UI expansion.

staged_execution_order: 1) Add typed state schemas for routing, track input set, assign slots, and ctl plan.
2) Add fixture-driven validation rules and diff output for MemoryPlan.
3) Only then expose/edit via UI controls domain-by-domain (Routing -> Assign -> Ctl -> Track bounce).
